global-dev.label: global-dev
global-dev.title: Global Development funding
global-dev.description: Open calls supporting research and programs in low- and middle-income countries: data for development, global health, financial inclusion, agriculture, education access.
example_queries: Gates Foundation open call global health

ai-work.label: ai-work
ai-work.title: AI & Future of Work funding
ai-work.description: Grants and fellowships studying how AI and automation reshape labor markets, wages, occupations, worker power, and economic mobility.

ai-agents.label: ai-agents
ai-agents.title: AI agents & frontier-AI funding
ai-agents.description: Calls for research on agentic AI: capabilities, deployment, evaluation, alignment, governance, and safety of multi-step autonomous systems. Covers EU Horizon, US programs, philanthropic RFPs, and rolling funds.
example_queries: Long-Term Future Fund AI safety grant

ai-eval.label: ai-eval
ai-eval.title: AI evaluation & benchmarks funding
ai-eval.description: Funding for building evaluations, benchmarks, red-teams, and measurement infrastructure for AI systems — including dangerous capability evals, agent evals, and societal-impact evals.
